title: Gemma Playground: Robot Duck
summary: Xavier Plantaz demonstrates Gemma 4 E2B running on-device on Raspberry Pi 5 and Jetson Orin Nano with multimodal inputs. The project integrates Parakeet for speech-to-text, Gemma 4 for inference, and Kokoro for text-to-speech to enable real-time voice and vision interaction with Open Duck Mini v2 robots.
writeup: Xavier Plantaz demonstrates Gemma 4 E2B running on-device on a Raspberry Pi 5 and a Jetson Orin Nano, handling multimodal inputs for the Open Duck Mini v2 robots. The pipeline chains Parakeet for speech-to-text, Gemma 4 for inference, and Kokoro for text-to-speech to support real-time voice and vision interaction. The build shows that a full multimodal voice and vision loop can run at the edge without offloading inference to the cloud.
